content_body: First vacation my husband and I have taken together (just us) in close to 13 years.  Married and three children later we decided we deserved something. My husband found Cabin Rentals of Georgia and handed me the number. I felt like I was talking to a friend EVERYTIME I would call. I would talk to our favorite southern sweetheart, Cynthia.  She was so helpful and they truly set us up with the best cabin with a great price.  It was the perfect escape [Or as we call it now, "askacape"] for my husband and I. Time to press the pause button, breath and reset so we could really appreciate the time we had. We are forever grateful and will be back again...and again ....lol and maybe again! Hope you are lucky enough to enjoy this beauty and all the amenities.  Must try the riverside restaurant BEST place there to eat!"
title: Perfect Escape
